title: carex lasiocarpa
intro: Carex lasiocarpa, also known as woody sedge, is a perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Carex lasiocarpa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Carex lasiocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to address various health concerns.
